news.t: The First Trust Morningstar Dividend Leaders Index Fund ETF's Holdings Imply 11% Gain Potential
The First Trust Morningstar Dividend Leaders Index Fund ETF's Holdings Imply 10% Gain Potential
The Math Shows The First Trust Morningstar Dividend Leaders Index Fund ETF Can Go To $34

holdings.infoBox: FDL is an equity ETF with a total of 86 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 9.46%, Chevron at 8.13%, Verizon Communications at 7.01%, Pfizer at 6.16%, and Merck & Co. at 5.40%.

overview.description: The First Trust Morningstar Dividend Leaders Index Fund (FDL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar Dividend Leaders index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of US companies with consistent and sustained dividend payments. The fund holds roughly 100 securities and excludes REITs. FDL was launched on Mar 9, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: For the First Trust Morningstar Dividend Leaders Index Fund ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $34.20 per unit.
